action_set_definitions.name: get_application_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific zoning variance application, including applicant info, current status, and specific variance request details.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning case (e.g., VAR-2025-099).

example_output.variance_request: 60% reduction in required parking (300 spaces reduction from 500 space baseline).

action_set_definitions.name: perform_technical_review
action_set_definitions.description: Evaluates the application against Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) technical thresholds for high-intensity variances, focusing on traffic and infrastructure impact.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning case.

deficiencies: Insufficient traffic mitigation for reduced parking volume

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_pedestrian_accessibility
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the site's pedestrian infrastructure to determine if it can offset the reduction in vehicle parking.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning case.

deficiencies: Lack of signalized crosswalks on East Sector

action_set_definitions.name: verify_offsite_parking_legality
action_set_definitions.description: Reviews the legal instruments and contracts associated with off-site parking to ensure long-term security and code compliance.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning case.

legal_issues: Off-site lease term is only 2 years; code requires 20 years

action_set_definitions.name: get_public_comments
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves community feedback and formal objections related to the application.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the zoning case.

comments: Concerned about spillover parking into residential streets

action_set_definitions.name: prescribe_mitigation_measures
action_set_definitions.description: Generates a list of required mitigation measures or contractual conversions based on identified deficiencies to ensure the variance is legally defensible.

identified_deficiencies.description: List of issues found during review.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_staff_recommendation
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final recommendation to the Board of Zoning Adjustment.

findings_of_fact.description: Detailed empirical justification based on the review.

required_conditions.description: Legal/technical conditions the applicant must meet.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the zoning variance case.
state_description.status: The current stage of the application: RECEIVED, UNDER_REVIEW, PUBLIC_NOTICE, HEARING_PENDING, DECIDED.
state_description.applicant_info: Details about the property owner and the specific parcel of land.
state_description.variance_request: Description of the requested deviation from code (e.g., 'Side yard setback reduced from 10ft to 5ft').
state_description.public_comments: List of strings/objects representing community feedback or objections.
state_description.legal_compliance_score: Internal assessment (0.0 to 1.0) of how well the application meets hardship criteria.
state_description.hearing_date: Scheduled date for the Board of Adjustment hearing, if applicable.

task_initial_state.variance_request: 60% reduction in parking via transit-oriented development credits and a shared-use lease with the adjacent commercial plaza.
public_comments: The walk to the transit station involves crossing a 6-lane arterial without a signal.
A 10-year lease is too short; if the lease ends, our neighborhood will be a parking lot.
